mapper.insert: INSERT INTO refresh_token (user_id, token_hash, expires_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{tokenHash}, #{expiresAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, token_hash, expires_at, revoked_at, created_at FROM refresh_token WHERE token_hash = #{tokenHash} AND revoked_at IS NULL AND expires_at > NOW()
mapper.update: UPDATE refresh_token SET revoked_at = NOW() WHERE token_hash = #{tokenHash} AND revoked_at IS NULL
UPDATE refresh_token SET revoked_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND revoked_at IS NULL
